description: Validate that nested cwd execution stays distinct from the bound workspace root in steward-to-worker handoff.
command: cargo test -p alan-runtime runtime::virtual_tools::tests::test_try_handle_virtual_tool_call_invoke_delegated_skill_keeps_workspace_root_separate_from_nested_cwd --lib -- --exact && cargo test -p alan-runtime runtime::child_agents::tests::child_workspace_root_uses_parent_workspace_instead_of_nested_tool_cwd --lib -- --exact
assertions: delegated launch preserves the nested cwd for execution
workspace root remains the repo boundary rather than the nested cwd
parent workspace binding is stable across child launch resolution
